text: The transition from the clean, empty glass meeting rooms outside to this vibrant, tactile exhibit space stirs a curious excitement within me. The words on the screen—about uncertainty and the optimism of new beginnings—echo how I feel now: on the threshold of discovery, engaged in an evolving dialogue between potential and reality. This environment, dedicated to research and development, makes me reflect on my own willingness to embrace ambiguity and learn. There is a gentle tension here: comfort in the order of the exterior, inspiration in the creative chaos within. I feel alive, slightly uncertain, but quietly hopeful.
